story_name: Sam Altman and the Great GPU Hunt (Revised for Generation Models)
story_overview: Sam Altman, frustrated by a GPU shortage, decides to find GPUs at a local supermarket. With simple readable signs and expressive actions, this short comedy tells a clear, visual story without complex motion or text.
reconstruct_target:
[Person A] man with short dark hair wearing navy hoodie under dark casual jacket and dark jeans
[Person B] man with short curly black hair wearing green store vest over white shirt and khaki pants
[Person D] person with short dark hair wearing rectangular glasses and red store apron over striped shirt
